supported_devices: any single 230V device (fans, humidifiers, heaters, dehumidifiers, pumps, lights)
compatible_ec_fans: any fan via AC outlet (on/off only, no speed control via this device)
compatible_lights: any light via AC outlet; Spider Farmer SF series, G series, SE series (on/off scheduling)
compatible_sensors: Spider Farmer GGS temp/humidity sensor (optional, via RJ12 port)
compatible_irrigation: any irrigation pump via AC outlet
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device via AC outlet
compatible_brand_ecosystem: Spider Farmer GGS (via app); designed to integrate non-Spider Farmer devices
recommended_use_note: Single-device smart plug for adding non-Spider Farmer devices to GGS ecosystem; can be centrally managed by GGS Pro Controller across multiple zones
uvp_notes: Regular retail price at GoGrow.de; official Spider Farmer EU price not confirmed directly
notes: EU version: 220-240V, 16A, 3680W. 12 customizable timer stages. Temperature/humidity sensor-based automation requires optional external GGS sensor via RJ12. Cannot connect RJ12 directly to GGS Controller Kit or GGS AC5/AC10 power strips. Can be managed by GGS Pro Controller across multi-zone setups. IR port for AC unit control listed as coming Q2 2026 (not yet available at time of research). US version differs: 110-125V, 15A, 1875W. Dimensions approx 62x73x58mm (converted from 2.46x2.86x2.30 inch).
